mapper.sql: id, row_id, vehicle_id, vehicle_type, vehicle_color, speed_value, speed_type, vehicle_brand, plate_number, plate_type, move_direction, create_time, is_intown, is_delete, update_time, alarm_description, alarm_time, alarm_sequence, alarm_name, alarm_type
mapper.insert:
insert into traffic_checkpoint (id, row_id, vehicle_id, vehicle_type, vehicle_color, speed_value, speed_type, vehicle_brand, plate_number, plate_type, move_direction, create_time, is_intown, is_delete, update_time, alarm_description, alarm_time, alarm_sequence, alarm_name, alarm_type ) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.rowId}, #{item.vehicleId}, #{item.vehicleType}, #{item.vehicleColor}, #{item.speedValue}, #{item.speedType}, #{item.vehicleBrand}, #{item.plateNumber}, #{item.plateType}, #{item.moveDirection}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.isIntown}, #{item.isDelete}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.alarmDescription}, #{item.alarmTime}, #{item.alarmSequence}, #{item.alarmName}, #{item.alarmType} )
on duplicate key update update_time = sysdate()
